message.content:
{
  "learning_outcomes": [
    {
      "unit_name": "Listening Skills (श्रवण कौशल)",
      "chapter_name": "Listening Skills (श्रवण कौशल)",
      "topic": "HS-001",
      "outcomes": [
        "Understanding general ability to understand words and phrases in appropriate contexts",
        "Understanding short coherent statements in appropriate contexts",
        "Understanding both appropriate and inappropriate contexts",
        "Understanding long statements with sufficient accuracy",
        "Understanding and analyzing the meaning of complex statements"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "Reading Skills (पठन कौशल)",
      "chapter_name": "Reading Skills (पठन कौशल)",
      "topic": "HS-002",
      "outcomes": [
        "Skimming to grasp the central theme",
        "Silent reading with concentration on a specific task",
        "Expressing opinion on read material",
        "Appreciating language, theme, and style",
        "Developing interest in community",
        "Developing reading skills according to different types of community",
        "Identifying meaning differences of words according to context"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "Writing Skills (लेखन कौशल)",
      "chapter_name": "Writing Skills (लेखन कौशल)",
      "topic": "HS-003",
      "outcomes": [
        "Following standard forms of language",
        "Using appropriate punctuation marks",
        "Using emotional language and writing style naturally",
        "Dividing into appropriate paragraphs",
        "Writing letters: Application, Invitation, Congratulatory, Condolence, Email, Order, SMS",
        "Filling various letter formats",
        "Gathering material from various sources to write on a specific topic",
        "Describing observed events and giving opinions",
        "Converting one language mode to another",
        "Preparing speeches for ceremonies and meetings",
        "Summarizing, condensing, and writing with emotion",
        "Explaining prose and poetry excerpts",
        "Expressing personal thoughts and feelings simply and effectively",
        "Maintaining coherence and unity of thought",
        "Bringing creativity in writing",
        "Writing readable text without unnecessary cutting",
        "Comparing two different texts and expressing their interconnection"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "Creative Expression (रचनात्मक अभिव्यक्ति)",
      "chapter_name": "Creative Expression (रचनात्मक अभिव्यक्ति)",
      "topic": "HS-004",
      "outcomes": [
        "Paragraph Writing: Completeness, Coherence, Topic-centered structure",
        "Paragraph Writing: Conciseness",
        "Letter Writing: Informal (friendship, simplicity, brevity)",
        "Letter Writing: Formal (official life, business, dialogue, advice, request)",
        "Advertisement Writing: Attractive style, novelty, slogans, visual elements",
        "Dialogue Writing: Connected purpose, character-appropriate language, expressions",
        "Short Story Writing: Narrative quality, interest/curiosity, character dialogue",
        "Card Writing: Relevance, brevity, language proficiency, creativity",
        "Email Writing: Understandable language, relevance, brevity, formal tone",
        "Autobiography Writing: Clarity, completeness, factual details (name, DOB, address, qualifications)",
        "Information Writing: Simple language, clarity, complete information, formal tone"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "खंड – ग (पाठ्यपुस्तक और पूरक पाठ्यपुस्तक)",
      "chapter_name": "खंड – ग (पाठ्यपुस्तक और पूरक पाठ्यपुस्तक)",
      "topic": "HS-005",
      "outcomes": [
        "Prose Reading: Knowledge, comprehension, expression based on prescribed lessons",
        "Poetry Reading: Comprehension of poetic elements and student understanding",
        "Supplementary Reader: Understanding prescribed lessons"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "खंड – घ (रचनात्मक लेखन)",
      "chapter_name": "खंड – घ (रचनात्मक लेखन)",
      "topic": "HS-006",
      "outcomes": [
        "Paragraph Writing: Expressing logical thoughts on three topics based on hints",
        "Letter Writing: Formal or informal expression on a specific topic",
        "Email Writing: Expression on various topics",
        "Short Story Writing: Based on given topic/title",
        "Dialogue Writing: Based on given topic/situation",
        "Information Writing: Based on practical life topics"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "खंड – क (अपठित बोध)",
      "chapter_name": "खंड – क (अपठित बोध)",
      "topic": "HS-007",
      "outcomes": [
        "Reading Comprehension: Unseen prose and poetry",
        "Analysis: Based on comprehension",
        "Appreciation: Based on comprehension"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "खंड – ख (व्याकरण व्याकरण)",
      "chapter_name": "खंड – ख (व्याकरण व्याकरण)",
      "topic": "HS-008",
      "outcomes": [
        "Grammar: Understanding prescribed topics",
        "Sentence Types: Based on structure",
        "Voice: Active and Passive forms",
        "Word Order: Punctuation and arrangement"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "4 अलोंकार- (अथाडलोंकार : उपमा , रू पक , उत्प्रेक्षा, अमतियोक्ति, मानवीकरर्)",
      "chapter_name": "उपमा , रू पक , उत्प्रेक्षा, अमतियोक्ति, मानवीकरर्)",
      "topic": "HS-009",
      "outcomes": [
        "Upma (Simile)",
        "Roopak (Metaphor)",
        "Utpreksha (Hyperbole)",
        "Alankarokti (Personification/Other)",
        "Manavikaran (Personification)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "3 ििंड – ग ( पाठ्यपुस्तक एििं पूरक पाठ्यपुस्त क)",
      "chapter_name": "3 ििंड – ग ( पाठ्यपुस्तक एििं पूरक पाठ्यपुस्त क)",
      "topic": "HS-010",
      "outcomes": [
        "Prose Reading: Knowledge, comprehension, expression based on prescribed lessons",
        "Poetry Reading: Comprehension of poetic elements and student understanding",
        "Supplementary Reader: Understanding prescribed lessons"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "4 ििंड – घ (रचनात्म क लेिन)",
      "chapter_name": "4 ििंड – घ (रचनात्म क लेिन)",
      "topic": "HS-011",
      "outcomes": [
        "Paragraph Writing: Expressing logical thoughts on three topics based on hints",
        "Letter Writing: Formal or informal expression on a specific topic",
        "Autobiography/Email Writing: Based on available facts",
        "Advertisement/Dialogue Writing: Based on given topic"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "आिंतररक मूल्ािंकन अिंक",
      "chapter_name": "आिंतररक मूल्ािंकन अिंक",
      "topic": "HS-012",
      "outcomes": [
        "Group Assessment",
        "Multiple Types of Assessment",
        "Projects",
        "Listening and Speaking Skills"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "हनधाजररत पुस्तकें",
      "chapter_name": "हनधाजररत पुस्तकें",
      "topic": "HS-013",
      "outcomes": [
        "Himachal Part 2, NCERT",
        "Kritika Part 2, NCERT"
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_name": "नोट – हनम्नहलक्तित पाठोिं से रश्न न ीिं पूछे ाएाँगे",
      "chapter_name": "नोट – हनम्नहलक्तित पाठोिं से रश्न न ीिं पूछे ाएाँगे",
      "topic": "HS-014",
      "outcomes": [
        "Himachal Part 2 Poetry Section Exclusions",
        "Prose Section Exclusions",
        "Kritika Part 2 Exclusions"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
